home.title: 업비트(Upbit) | 가장 신뢰받는 디지털 자산 거래소

layout_notes: 1400px fixed content width on desktop (nav inner width = 1400)
Two-surface model: marketing home (light, hero, palette accents) + exchange grid (information-dense table-first)
Tables = primary UI primitive. ≥3 table types: market list, orderbook, trade history, daily candle history
Row tinting (rgba 8% alpha) communicates direction at glance — never solid fill (would compete with text)
Nav fixed top, single-row, no shadow; segment switches inline (KO/EN, KRW/BTC/USDT)
